title: City Civil Court Chennai – Data Entry Operator – 22 Posts
shortInfo: City Civil Court Chennai Recruitment 2026 for 22 posts of Data Entry Operator. Candidates with B.Sc, BCA, B.E, M.Tech, M.Sc Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 28-05-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through City Civil Court Chennai official website.
